# Bundled UI fonts

Chroni bundles the following unmodified font software through Fontsource:

- Inter Variable 5.2.8 — Copyright 2016 The Inter Project Authors (https://github.com/rsms/inter)
- Noto Sans SC Variable 5.2.10 — Copyright Google Inc.

Both fonts are distributed under the SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1. The complete license text is included in `OFL-1.1.txt` in this directory.
